title: helenium rosilla
intro: Helenium rosilla, also known as Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues, including colds, fever, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Helenium rosilla include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Helenium rosilla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits and medicinal properties.
